description_long: This is a medium-sized, deep blue bucket with a polygonal, slightly faceted body and a wide open top. The bucket features two thick, white rope handles attached to opposite sides, allowing for easy carrying. The surface of the bucket is smooth and matte, with no visible markings, labels, or reinforcements. The interior is hollow and spacious, suitable for holding liquids or various materials. The bucket appears to be made primarily of plastic, with the handles constructed from braided rope. Its design is utilitarian and robust, making it suitable for use in urban environments such as parks, garages, or construction sites.
description: A deep blue, faceted plastic bucket with thick white rope handles and a smooth, matte finish. The bucket is open-topped and utilitarian, ideal for carrying or storing materials.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open top, deep blue body, and one white rope handle on the left side.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting both white rope handles, with one handle draped inside the bucket.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open top and both rope handles symmetrically on either side.
description_view_3: Angled view with both rope handles visible, one handle hanging inside the bucket.
